testcase.name: test_real_weight_prefill_decode_matches_single_chip_optimized[blackhole-full_attention-tp-mesh_device0-device_params0]
testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), expert_strategy = 'tp' layer_type = 'full_attention'
@_mesh_test @pytest.mark.parametrize("expert_strategy", [EXPERT_STRATEGY_TP, EXPERT_STRATEGY_EP]) @pytest.mark.parametrize("layer_type", ["sliding_attention", "full_attention"]) def test_real_weight_prefill_decode_matches_single_chip_optimized(mesh_device, expert_strategy, layer_type): reference_path = _real_reference_path(layer_type) assert reference_path.exists(), "run the isolated real-weight optimized baseline capture first" reference = torch.load(reference_path, map_location="cpu", weights_only=True) config = _config() config.layer_types = list(config.layer_types) config.layer_types[LAYER_IDX] = layer_type decoder = _decoder( _real_state_dict(), config, mesh_device, max_cache_len=256, expert_strategy=expert_strategy ) page_table = decoder.create_page_table(list(reversed(range(decoder.num_cache_blocks)))) key_cache, value_cache = decoder.create_kv_cache() generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(20260718) prefill_len = config.sliding_window prefill_hidden = torch.randn(1, prefill_len, config.hidden_size, generator=generator).to(torch.bfloat16) output = decoder.prefill_forward( _to_tt(prefill_hidden, mesh_device), key_cache=key_cache, value_cache=value_cache, page_table=page_table, ) _assert_pcc(f"{expert_strategy}-{layer_type}-prefill", reference["prefill"], _to_torch(output), 0.99) _assert_replicated(f"{expert_strategy}-{layer_type}-prefill", output)
last_output = None for position in range(prefill_len, prefill_len + 3): hidden = reference[f"hidden_{position}"] attention = decoder._decode_attention( _to_tt(hidden, mesh_device), key_cache, value_cache, page_table, position, _position_tensor(position, mesh_device), ) _assert_pcc( f"{expert_strategy}-{layer_type}-attention-{position}", reference[f"attention_{position}"], _to_torch(attention), 0.99, ) normalized = decoder._decode_post_attention_norm(attention) routing = decoder._route(normalized, 1) if expert_strategy == EXPERT_STRATEGY_TP: last_output = decoder._sparse_moe_forward(attention, normalized, routing, 1) else: partial = decoder._ep_active_expert_chunk(normalized, routing, is_decode=True) last_output = ttnn.add(attention, decoder._all_reduce(partial, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)) > _assert_pcc( f"{expert_strategy}-{layer_type}-routing-{position}", reference[f"routing_{position}"], _to_torch(routing), 0.99, )
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:320: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
name = 'tp-full_attention-routing-129' reference = tensor([0.0000, 0.0000, 0.2393, 0.2500, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000... 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], dtype=torch.bfloat16) actual = tensor([0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.2500, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000... 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.2393, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], dtype=torch.bfloat16) threshold = 0.99
def _assert_pcc(name, reference, actual, threshold): passed, message = comp_pcc(reference.float(), actual.float(), threshold) print(f"PCC_RESULT path={name} threshold={threshold} {message}") > assert passed, message E AssertionError: 0.7251411656390637 E assert False
